name: ClickUp
description: Drive ClickUp (project management) from any AI agent: spaces, folders, lists, tasks, comments, time tracking, custom fields, teams, members. 16 tools, API token auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the ClickUp API v2 (clickup.com/api).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to ClickUp → top-right avatar → **Settings → Apps → API Token → Generate** (personal token).
2. Copy the token (starts with `pk_`). Set `CLICKUP_API_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: header `Authorization: ${CLICKUP_API_TOKEN}` — no `Bearer ` or `Token ` prefix, just the raw key. The adapter sets this via API_KEY profile.

**Hierarchy**: Workspace (=Team) → Space → Folder (optional) → List → Task → Subtask. Lists can also exist directly inside a Space without a Folder. Discover IDs top-down: `clickup_list_teams` (returns workspaces, oddly called 'teams' in the API) → `clickup_list_spaces(teamId)` → `clickup_list_folders(spaceId)` → `clickup_list_lists(folderId)` OR `clickup_list_folderless_lists(spaceId)`.

**Task IDs**: every task has an `id` (e.g. `abc123`). The same task can also be addressed by `custom_id` (the human-readable like 'PROJ-42') if your workspace enabled custom task IDs — set `custom_task_ids=true` in calls that use custom IDs.

**Statuses are per-list**: each list has its own status set ('Open', 'In Progress', 'Done'). To move a task, set `status` to a status name (case-insensitive) that exists on the task's current list.

**Custom fields**: arrays of `{id, value}` on every task. Discover via `clickup_get_list_custom_fields(listId)`.

**Assignees**: array of user IDs (NOT emails). Get user IDs from `clickup_list_team_members(teamId)`.

**Date fields**: Unix timestamp in MILLISECONDS (not seconds), e.g. `1717200000000`.

**Pagination**: most list endpoints return up to 100 by default. Some support `page` (0-indexed) + `order_by` + `reverse`.

**Rate limits**: 100 req/min for Free Forever, scales up with plan. On 429 honor `X-RateLimit-Reset` (Unix timestamp).

**Out of scope here**: webhooks, automations, dependencies, goals/targets, attachments upload (use external URL), chat, dashboards, sprints.

tools.name: clickup_get_authorized_user
tools.description: Return the authenticated user: id, username, email, color, profilePicture, initials. Health check + whoami.

tools.name: clickup_list_teams
tools.description: List workspaces (called 'teams' in the API — confusingly different from per-workspace 'teams' which are user groups). Each returns id, name, color, avatar, members[].

tools.name: clickup_list_spaces
tools.description: List spaces in a workspace. Each space has id, name, private flag, statuses[], features (multiple_assignees, due_dates, custom_fields, etc.).

tools.name: clickup_list_folders
tools.description: List folders in a space. Each folder has id, name, override_statuses flag, hidden flag, lists[].

tools.name: clickup_list_folderless_lists
tools.description: List lists that live directly in a space (no parent folder).

tools.name: clickup_list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks in a list with filtering. Supports filter by assignees, statuses, due_date_gt/lt, custom_fields, tags. Cursor pagination via page (0-indexed).

tools.name: clickup_get_task
tools.description: Fetch a single task by ID with all fields including custom_fields, checklists, comments_count, dependencies, watchers.

custom_task_ids.description: If true, taskId is interpreted as a custom_id (like 'PROJ-42').

tools.name: clickup_create_task
tools.description: Create a task in a list. Required: name. Date fields are Unix ms. Assignees are user IDs.

markdown_description.description: Explicit Markdown description (ClickUp prefers this over `description`).

status.description: Status name (case-insensitive). Must exist on the list.

due_date_time.description: If true, due_date includes a time component.

parent.description: Parent task ID — creates this as a subtask.

tools.name: clickup_update_task
tools.description: Update a task. Common: change status, reassign, change due_date.

assignees.description: {add:[id1,id2], rem:[id3]} — incremental update of assignees (NOT a full replacement).

tools.name: clickup_delete_task
tools.description: Delete a task. Moves to trash (recoverable for 30 days from UI).

tools.name: clickup_create_task_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a task.

assignee.description: Optional user ID to assign as a follow-up.

tools.name: clickup_list_task_comments
tools.description: List comments on a task. Returns each comment's id, comment_text, assignee, resolved, date.

start.description: Pagination cursor (Unix ms of comment to start from).

tools.name: clickup_get_list_custom_fields
tools.description: List custom fields available on a list, with their IDs and types. Required to compose custom_fields arrays.

tools.name: clickup_list_team_members
tools.description: List members of a workspace. Returns id (use as assignee), username, email, color, role.
